title: Twenty-five new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta May 27
summary: On May 27, YKHC reports twenty-five new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. title: Tribal Member Award nominations open
summary: Nominations are being accepted for the Kenaitze Tribal Member of the Year Awards. Tribal Members, excluding current Tribal Council Members, may be nominated in the following categories: Kenaitze Tribal Member Elder Recognition Award: Recognizes a Tribal Member who has shown dedication to Alaska Native culture, heritage and communities. title: BSNC Encourages Voters to Get Out and Vote
summary: BSNC encourages you to get out and vote! It is time to #GetOutTheNativeVote. For the special election, all ballots must be mailed and postmarked on or before June 11. To learn more, visit: https://elections.alaska.gov/specialelections.php .

title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: May 26, 2022
summary: May 26, 2022: Over the past week, the sea ice has now decreased by a very slightly higher rate of 2.42% from the level on 05/19/2022 of 12.782 M km 2 to 12.473M km 2 for this week.
